query: i'm presenting our new microservices architecture to the eng leadership team next thursday and need a clean diagram with the api gateway, auth service, payment service, kafka, and the postgres + redis stores. can you put it in ./docs/arch/ as both png and the editable drawio file?
我刚把后端从单体拆成了 3 个服务（user / order / catalog），用 grpc 互相调用，rabbitmq 做异步，前端是 nextjs。能画一张架构图吗？保存到当前目录就行

we're writing the technical appendix for our IEEE submission and the reviewer asked for a clearer figure of our model — it's a transformer encoder (12 layers) feeding into a contrastive head plus a classification head, with a frozen vision tower as input. need svg for latex

could you put together an ER diagram for the new posts/comments/users schema? users have many posts, posts have many comments (cascade delete), and there's a likes join table between users and posts. PK on id, FK on author_id

we need a flowchart of the refund decision logic: check if order < 30 days old, if yes auto-approve under 50 USD else route to manager; if older deny unless customer is gold tier. needs to go in the runbook as a PDF
draw a sequence diagram for the OAuth2 PKCE flow we're implementing — client, auth server, resource server, with the code_verifier/code_challenge dance

okay so my coworker's been complaining she can't visualize how the data flows in our pipeline. we ingest from kafka -> spark structured streaming -> s3 raw -> dbt models -> snowflake -> looker. can u sketch this out for her?
我需要给老板讲一下我们 RAG pipeline 的架构：embedding 模型、向量库（qdrant）、检索器、reranker、LLM 调用层。最好分层画出来，导出 png
remember the style preset i saved as 'corporate-v2'? use it to draw a deployment diagram showing our k8s pods (api, worker, scheduler), services, and the postgres rds
i made some changes to my style preset — can we re-render the architecture diagram from yesterday with the new colors? the source is at ./diagrams/system.drawio
can you visualize this dataset i just loaded from /tmp/signups.csv? it's user signup counts per day for the last 6 months — i'm thinking a line chart with maybe a 7-day rolling average overlay
draw me a picture of a golden retriever sitting in a flower garden, late afternoon light, photorealistic 4k
我有一份 PDF 论文，里面有一张架构图，能不能帮我把它改写成 mermaid 代码？我们 readme 用 mermaid
explain how kubernetes pods, services, and deployments relate to each other — i'm prepping for a platform engineering interview tomorrow morning
i need a class diagram with these 4 classes — User, Order, Product, ShoppingCart. plantuml please, the team uses it for everything and we have it in CI
我需要画一张白板风格的草图来 brainstorm 这个产品流程，最好是手绘感觉的，方便分享给设计同事
i want to add a diagram to my open source project's README — must be text-defined, no binaries in the repo, git-friendly diff, render natively on github
我看到一个图标库 mxgraph.aws4 — drawio desktop 这个程序怎么从命令行直接装一个新的形状库？
convert this PNG screenshot at ~/Desktop/old-org-chart.png into editable drawio XML so I can modify the boxes — basically OCR + reverse extraction
我现在 vscode 里装了 hediet.vscode-drawio 这个插件，正在编辑 ./arch.drawio。能给我点建议怎么把鉴权那一层加进去吗？我自己来改
